title: Galaktoboureko with Grilled Fish
description: A twist on the classic Greek dessert, paired with a delicious grilled fish dish. The rich, creamy custard of the galaktoboureko is a perfect complement to the fresh flavors of the sea.

ingredients.name: Fish fillets (such as sea bass or cod)

instructions: Season the fish fillets with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Grill the fish for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare the galaktoboureko by cutting it into wedges.
Mix the Greek yogurt with chopped dill, garlic, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Serve the grilled fish on top of the galaktoboureko wedges, with a dollop of yogurt sauce.
Drizzle with rich honey and serve immediately.
Repeat with the remaining fish and galaktoboureko.
